description:
📅 April 29th
🕕 4 - 7 PM
🍷 Caymus
📍Whispering Vine South Creek

Buy a bottle from the tasting, get the tasting fee refunded.

Featured Wines:

  • Caymus California Cabernet Sauvignon 2023 - $44.99, Winery $55
  • Red Schooner by Caymus Voyage 12 - $29.99
  • Red Schooner by Caymus Transit No. 2 - $39.99, Winery $50
  • Bonanza by Chuck Wagner The Vinekeeper Cabernet Sauvignon - $29.99
title: Caymus Tasting at South Creek
